title: Source Tier Catalog
status_note: generic source-tier catalog; fixture coverage only, not proof of private corpus completeness

tiers.role: Contractual clause evidence for definitions, coverage triggers, exclusions, riders, and tables.
tiers.search_target: insurer policy clauses, riders, appendices, and contract tables

tiers.role: Product-level disclosure evidence for summaries, refund tables, product options, and pre-contract material.
tiers.search_target: product disclosures, product summaries, refund tables, and public product pages

tiers.role: Official consumer guidance for general rules, public notices, comparison material, and consumer-facing explanations.
tiers.search_target: official consumer guidance, public association material, and regulator-style consumer documents

tiers.role: Operational claim guidance for documents, submission steps, processing channels, and workflow instructions.
tiers.search_target: claim guides, claim FAQ material, document checklists, and operational help pages

tiers.role: Dispute and denial precedent material for contested payments, reviews, complaints, and similar resolved cases.
tiers.search_target: dispute summaries, denial-case explanations, review precedents, and complaint-resolution material

tiers.role: General professional guidance when the answer is explanatory and not safely grounded in a contract or official source alone.
tiers.search_target: licensed or reviewable expert guidance archives and general professional explanations

tiers.role: Abstention route when private contract, rider, date, diagnosis, denial, or underwriting context is required.
Abstention route for requests outside insurance evidence retrieval.
